user.title: Sentinel
user.description: Sentinel will start monitoring your integrations, devices and applications with sensible defaults. You can adjust all settings after setup.

data.fire_events: Fire events on the HA bus

data_description.fire_events: Fire a `sentinel_item_changed` event on the HA event bus on every state change. Required for automations.
data_description.grace_period: How long an integration must remain in a failed state before being reported (0 = immediate).
data_description.ignored_device_sources: Device sources to exclude from monitoring (e.g. mobile_app, cast). Sources are listed from your current installation.
data_description.ignored_device_ids: Specific devices to exclude from monitoring.
data_description.watch_stopped_addons: When enabled, stopped applications are reported as warnings. By default a stopped application is considered intentional.
data_description.apps_poll_interval: How often Sentinel queries the Supervisor for application states (30–300 seconds, default 60).
